title: saxifraga jacquemontiana var. stella-aurea
intro: Saxifraga jacquemontiana var. stella-aurea, also known as Golden Saxifrage, is a type of flowering plant in the saxifrage family that is native to the Himalayas and other parts of Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation, act as an antiseptic, and exhibit diuretic properties. The health benefits of Golden Saxifrage include its potential to alleviate symptoms of urinary tract infections, reduce blood pressure, and soothe digestive issues. Traditional herbal preparations of Golden Saxifrage include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
